title: Cosmic Shadows: The Enigma of Dark Matter and Dark Energy
topic: The Dark Matter and Dark Energy Enigma

questions.sentence: The overwhelming majority an astonishing 95 remains shrouded in mystery comprising two elusive components dark matter and dark energy
These cosmic shadows neither emitting nor reflecting light dictate the universes structure and ultimate fate presenting physicists with perhaps the most profound conundrum of our age

Whatever dark matter is it doesn't interact with the electromagnetic force meaning it doesn't absorb reflect or emit light making it fundamentally different from the baryonic matter that makes up everything we can touch and see
This groundbreaking discovery which earned a Nobel Prize necessitated a repulsive force acting on cosmic scales pushing galaxies further apart at an everincreasing rate
Unravelling the mysteries of dark matter and dark energy remains at the forefront of modern physics and cosmology
